example: I see you have availability on the earlier flight.
zh: 可用性，指某物是否有空或可取得

example: You have the run class of ticket, I can't change it.
zh: 票種等級，指機票的艙等或票種
ja: 運賃クラス、航空券の種類や等級

example: Let me talk to my supervisor about this issue.
zh: 主管，負責監督和管理的人

example: I'm determined to get you home to your family.
ja: 決心している、断固とした

example: We get somebody who understands and cares about what we're trying to accomplish.
Good service means someone cares about your needs.
zh: 服務，為他人提供幫助或支持
ja: サービス、提供される支援や助け

example: The agent said you have the wrong class of ticket.
zh: 代理人，代表公司或組織的人
